inputs.label: Smoking Start Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which the individual began smoking regularly.

inputs.label: Smoking End Age (or Current Age)
inputs.businessContext: The age at which smoking ended, or the current age if still smoking.

inputs.label: Average Cigarettes per Day
inputs.businessContext: The average number of cigarettes smoked per day during the smoking period.

inputs.label: Cigarettes per Pack
inputs.businessContext: The number of cigarettes contained in a single pack, typically 20.
